overlooked.gap: Missing dead-end state handling. When an admin executes T034 (封禁用户), there is no corresponding UI state or forced logout flow defined for the banned user to explain their account status.
Missing cross-role feedback loop. After the admin processes a complaint, there is no defined notification mechanism or UI for the end-user to see the resolution.

overlooked.role: AI 训练师/系统管理员
overlooked.task: 检测异常对话 (T039) -> 封禁用户 (T034)
overlooked.gap: Missing cross-role handoff. There is no workflow connecting the AI Trainer's detection of abnormal behavior to the Admin's banning action.
Missing asynchronous flow handling. Report generation is typically async, but there is no notification system or 'Download Center' defined to retrieve the exported file.

false_positives: 任务 T003 (刷新登录凭证) 无对应界面: Token refresh is a background API process and inherently does not require a dedicated UI screen.
任务 T016 (查看成就列表) 界面无 is_primary 标记的操作: Viewing a list is a passive consumption task and does not require a primary action button.
任务 T033 (查看用户详情) 界面无 is_primary 标记的操作: Viewing user details is a read-only task and does not strictly require a primary action.
任务 T041 (查看发音分析报告) 界面无 is_primary 标记的操作及反馈: Read-only analytical views do not require primary action buttons or success/failure mutation feedback.
任务 T045 (查看用户反馈) 界面无 is_primary 标记的操作及反馈: Passive viewing tasks do not require primary actions or mutation feedback.
任务 T047 (查看用户行为分析) 界面无 is_primary 标记的操作及反馈: Data dashboard viewing is passive and does not require primary actions or mutation feedback.

adjustments.reason: 退出登录缺少异常处理会影响账户安全与会话一致性，属于中风险基础能力。
角色权限CRUD不完整可能导致权限配置失效或越权风险，属于安全相关能力。
复习统计摘要缺少异常处理会影响核心学习反馈闭环，直接影响留存与学习效果。
发音分析报告属于核心学习结果页，异常无处理会造成结果不可用或误解，影响核心价值。
